hero.name: Roman Ferrero
hero.tagline: I build modern web applications while finishing my Computer Engineering degree at Universidad ORT Uruguay.

about.title: Passionate about shipping quality software
about.lead: I am an advanced Computer Engineering student at Universidad ORT Uruguay, focused on full-stack development. I enjoy solving problems with clean code, crafting interfaces that feel good to use, and understanding the business domain behind every project.
about.secondary: I care about the full product lifecycle: from architecture and data modeling to user experience and performance. I am looking for opportunities to join teams where I can learn, contribute and build products that make a real impact.

skills.title: Tools and technologies
skills.lead: My current stack across academic and personal projects. Always evolving and eager to pick up new technologies when they bring value to the product.

projects.title: Things I have built
projects.lead: A curated selection of academic and personal projects where I apply what I learn and experiment with new technologies.
